step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.desc: Listen to your needs, analyze the situation, and propose an appropriate approach.

step2.title: Legal Analysis
step2.desc: Research regulations, assess risks, and develop a detailed strategy.

step3.title: Implementation
step3.desc: Draft documents, represent in negotiations or litigation per the agreed plan.

step4.title: Follow-up & Support
step4.desc: Report results, provide post-matter advisory, and support long-term compliance.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Over 15 years partnering with Vietnamese businesses
about.intro: Minh An Law Firm was founded with the mission of providing high-quality legal advisory services, helping clients resolve legal matters efficiently and safely. We believe law is a tool to protect legitimate rights and promote sustainable development.
about.mission: To deliver comprehensive, accurate, and timely legal solutions that contribute to a transparent and compliant business environment.
about.vision: To become a leading law firm in Vietnam, trusted by domestic and international enterprises.
about.history: Since 2010, Minh An Law Firm has continuously expanded its team and elevated service quality. We now serve over 200 domestic and international businesses across corporate, labor, real estate, and intellectual property law.

values.integrity: Integrity — Acting honestly and ethically in every situation.
values.professionalism: Professionalism — Upholding the highest standards of legal practice.
values.dedication: Dedication — Placing client interests at the forefront.
values.confidentiality: Confidentiality — Absolute protection of client information.
